header.title: Example Quiz
header.description: This is the first example of a quiz

questions.Q: This is the first test question. The 'CorrectIndex' field is the index of the correct answer in the array 'A'. So the answer is A.
A: They say this is the correct answer.
Who knows, this could be the correct answer.
Or you might have to trust the question.

questions.Q: This is the second test question, the correct answer could be B.
This is the third test question. I wont give out the correct answer.
A: I tell the truth, I am the correct answer.
A lies, I am not the correct answer.
B tells the truth and so do I, I am the correct answer

questions.Q: Questions can have multiple answers. Try submitting answer D and B
